title: Désiré
actors: Sacha Guitry, Jacqueline Delubac, Jacques Baumer
plot: Shavian social satire. Odette is an actress who's now the mistress of a government minister. Her household of cook, maid, and chauffeur needs a valet. On the eve of going with the minister to Deauville, she engages Désiré, a robus...
